ideation: This animation sequence simulates the natural arm swing of a person walking.  The arms move in opposition to each other, creating a rhythmic motion.  The robot's lack of elbows will be compensated for by a slightly exaggerated swing to maintain the illusion of natural movement.  The wrist will remain neutral to avoid unnecessary complexity.  The overall style will be relaxed and casual, reflecting the simple nature of walking. The sequence will use 5 frames to capture the flow of the walk.

frames.beat: arms swing back and forth, a relaxed walk begins
the left arm swings forward, right arm back
arms naturally swing to opposite sides
the right arm swings forward, left arm back
arms settle into a steady walking rhythm
